# Copilot Repository Instructions

- Store all project documentation markdown files in the docs folder.
- Keep only root README.md at repository root unless the user explicitly requests another root markdown file.
- When user asks to create a markdown file without a path, default to docs/<descriptive-name>.md.
- When moving or creating docs, update internal links to use relative paths from docs.
- Prefer concise, actionable checklists for planning documents.
